feature.name: iCalendar recurrence (rrule) core
feature.description: Extract python-dateutil rrule/rruleset/rrulestr recurrence iteration for naive datetimes without timezone, general parser, or relativedelta machinery.
included_behaviors: rrule iteration with freq, interval, count, until, and BY* filters
rrulestr for RRULE lines with naive iCalendar date values
weekday constants MO..SU and freq constants
excluded_behaviors: original dateutil package import at runtime

entanglement.description: Recurrence couples RFC grammar parsing, calendar bitmask state, leap years, setpos/weekday interactions, generator caching, and rruleset merging.
signals: rrulestr maps RFC tokens to constructor kwargs
BYSETPOS interacts with BYDAY monthly masks

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import rrule, rruleset, rrulestr, YEARLY, MONTHLY, WEEKLY, DAILY, MO, TU, WE, TH, FR, SA, SU
